source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Carol M. Highsmith Archive
license: Public domain (dedicated to the public by the photographer per 1991 LoC agreement)
title: Skyline, Juneau, Alaska
description: Elevated view of Juneau's downtown waterfront from a vantage above the Tongass National Forest, showing the state capital nestled between Mount Roberts/Mount Juneau and Gastineau Channel, with multiple cruise ships docked along the working waterfront.
alt: Skyline view of Juneau, Alaska with cruise ships docked along Gastineau Channel and forested mountains behind
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from loc.gov storage-services (highsm 04433) and visually confirmed
